title: damah #1820
definition:
1) to cease, cause to cease, cut off, destroy, perish
    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to cease
        1a2) to cause to cease, destroy
    1b) (Niphal)
        1b1) to be cut off
        1b2) to be undone, be cut off at sight of the theophany
nasbUsage:

    1a) (Qal)
        1a1) to cease
        1a2) to cause to cease, destroy
    1b) (Niphal)

        1b2) to be undone, be cut off at sight of the theophany

    NASB:  to cease, cause to cease, cut off, destroy
